    Private Function StrConvert(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String
        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = "ON"
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = "OFF"
        ElseIf str = "-" Then
            tmp = "-"
        Else
            tmp = "-"
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub SaveGrid(ByVal strID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strID & "' ORDER BY SeqID asc", MdbConnect)
        With Grid1
            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
                MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 1).Text
                Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 2).Text
                Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 3).Text
                Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 4).Text
                Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 5).Text
                Rs.Fields("Type").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 6).Text
                Rs.Fields("Target").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 7).Text
                Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 8).Text
                Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 9).Text
                Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 10).Text
                Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(1, 11).Text)
                Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 12).Text
                Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(1, 13).Text)
                Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 14).Text
                Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(1, 15).Text)
                Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 16).Text
                Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(1, 17).Text)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 18).Text
                Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 19).Text
                Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 20).Text
                Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 21).Text
                Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 22).Text
                Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 23).Text
                Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 24).Text
                Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 25).Text
                Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = str2Bool(Grid1.Cell(1, 26).Text)
                Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = str2Bool(Grid1.Cell(1, 27).Text)
                Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = str2Bool(Grid1.Cell(1, 28).Text)
                Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = Grid1.Cell(1, 29).Text
                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                i = 1
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 1).Text
                    Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text
                    Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 3).Text
                    Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text
                    Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 5).Text
                    Rs.Fields("Type").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 6).Text
                    Rs.Fields("Target").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 7).Text
                    Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 8).Text
                    Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 9).Text
                    Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 10).Text
                    Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(i, 11).Text)
                    Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 12).Text
                    Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(i, 13).Text)
                    Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 14).Text
                    Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(i, 15).Text)
                    Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 16).Text
                    Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = StrConvert(Grid1.Cell(i, 17).Text)
                    Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 18).Text
                    Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 19).Text
                    Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 20).Text
                    Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 21).Text
                    Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 22).Text
                    Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 23).Text
                    Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 24).Text
                    Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 25).Text
                    Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = str2Bool(Grid1.Cell(i, 26).Text)
                    Rs.Fields("duplicateCheck").Value = str2Bool(Grid1.Cell(i, 27).Text)
                    Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = str2Bool(Grid1.Cell(i, 28).Text)
                    Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 29).Text
                    Rs.Update()
                    i = i + 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End With

        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Function str2Bool(ByVal str As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False

        If str.ToUpper = "TRUE" Then
            tmp = True
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Insert(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)

        Rs.AddNew()

        Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = strWorkID
        Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = CStr(CDbl(strSeqID) + 0.1)
        Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"

        Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
        Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = False

    Private Sub Delete(ByVal strWorkID As String, ByVal strSeqID As String)

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & strWorkID & "' AND SeqID = " & strSeqID, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Delete()
            Rs.Update()
            ClickIndex = 0
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Function GetNewWorkId() As String

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpNewID As String

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
        TmpNewID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

        Return TmpNewID

    End Function

        Dim fromTmp(100) As String
        Dim toTmp(100) As String

        Try
            If ClickIndex <> 0 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Cols - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text
                    toTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex + 1, i).Text
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text = toTmp(i)
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex + 1, i).Text = fromTmp(i)
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        
    End Sub

    Private Sub ButtonUp_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles ButtonUp.Click

        Dim fromTmp(100) As String
        Dim toTmp(100) As String

        Try

            If ClickIndex > 1 Then
                For i = 3 To Grid1.Cols - 1
                    fromTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text
                    toTmp(i) = Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex - 1, i).Text
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, i).Text = toTmp(i)
                    Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex - 1, i).Text = fromTmp(i)
                Next
                SaveGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                InitGrid()
                LoadGrid(ComboBox2.Text)
                ClickIndex = 0
            Else
                MsgBox("Select Row !")
            End If

        Catch ex As Exception

        End Try
        
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button8_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button8.Click
        columncheck()
    End Sub

    Private Sub ColumnCheck()

        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 1 To Grid1.Rows - 1
            If Grid1.Cell(i, 28).BooleanValue = True Then
                'ExecuteQurrySQL("ALTER TABLE " & ServerTableName & " ADD " & ServerColumnName & "_" & Grid1.Cell(i, 29).Text & " NVARCHAR(200) NULL")
                ExecuteQurrySQL("ALTER TABLE " & ServerTableName & " ADD " & Grid1.Cell(i, 29).Text & " NVARCHAR(200) NULL")
            End If
        Next
        
    End Sub

   282→    ' 데이터 로드
   283→    Private Sub LoadGrid(workID As String)
   284→        DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()  ' 삭제 대기 목록 초기화
   285→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   286→        Try
   287→            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   288→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   289→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   290→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   291→
   292→            InitGrid()
   293→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)
   294→
   295→            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
   296→                Rs.MoveFirst()
   297→                Do Until Rs.EOF
   298→                    Dim rowIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Add()
   299→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
   300→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value)
   301→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value)
   302→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value)

   305→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Target").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Target").Value)
   306→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value)
   307→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value)
   308→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1").Value)
   309→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value)
   310→                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2").Value)

   340→    ' NULL 체크
   341→    Private Function NullCheck(value As Object) As String
   342→        If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then
   343→            Return ""
   344→        Else
   345→            Return value.ToString()
   346→        End If
   347→    End Function

   349→    ' 저장 - 삭제/신규/수정 모두 처리
   350→    Private Sub SaveGrid(workID As String)
   351→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   352→        Try
   353→            ' 1. 삭제 대기 항목 DB에서 삭제
   354→            For Each seqID As String In DeletedSeqIDs
   355→                MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID)
   356→            Next
   357→            DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()
   358→
   359→            ' 2. 기존 데이터 모두 삭제 후 그리드 내용으로 다시 INSERT (순서 보장)
   360→            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "'")
   361→
   362→            ' 3. 그리드 내용 순서대로 INSERT
   363→            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   364→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   365→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   366→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   367→
   368→            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
   369→                Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
   370→                Rs.AddNew()
   371→                Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
   372→                Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = i + 1  ' 순번 재할당
   373→                Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value)
   374→                Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value)
   375→                Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value)
   376→                Rs.Fields("Type").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value)
   377→                Rs.Fields("Target").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value)
   378→                Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value)
   379→                Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value)
   380→                Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value)
   381→                Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value)
   382→                Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value)
   383→                Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value)
   384→                Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value)
   385→                Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value)

   390→                Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value)
   391→                Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
   392→                Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value)

   400→                Rs.Update()

   404→            MsgBox("저장되었습니다.", MsgBoxStyle.Information, "Save")
   405→        Catch ex As Exception

   490→    ' 새 시퀀스 삽입
   491→    Private Sub InsertNewSeq(workID As String, seqID As Double)
   492→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   493→        Try
   494→            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   495→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   496→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   497→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   498→
   499→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
   500→            Rs.AddNew()
   501→            Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
   502→            Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = seqID
   503→            Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
   504→            Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = "30"
   505→            Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
   506→            Rs.Fields("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
   507→            Rs.Fields("Target").Value = "0"
   508→            Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
   509→            Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
   510→            Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
   511→            Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
   512→            Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
   513→            Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
   514→            Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
   515→            Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
   516→            Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
   517→            Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
   518→            Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
   519→            Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
   520→            Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
   521→            Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
   522→            Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
   523→            Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
   524→            Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
   525→            Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"

   527→            Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = False

   539→    ' Reload 후 SeqID 재정렬
   540→    Private Sub ReloadAndReorder(workID As String)
   541→        SaveGrid(workID)
   542→        LoadGrid(workID)
   543→
   544→        ' SeqID 재정렬
   545→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   546→        Try
   547→            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   548→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   549→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   550→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   551→
   552→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)
   553→            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
   554→                Dim num As Integer = 1
   555→                Rs.MoveFirst()
   556→                Do Until Rs.EOF
   557→                    Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = num
   558→                    Rs.Update()
   559→                    num += 1
   560→                    Rs.MoveNext()
   561→                Loop
   562→            End If
   563→            Rs.Close()
   564→        Catch ex As Exception
   565→            MsgBox("재정렬 오류: " & ex.Message)
   566→        Finally
   567→            ConnectionCloseMDB()
   568→        End Try
   569→
   570→        LoadGrid(workID)
   571→    End Sub

   573→    ' Delete 버튼 - 그리드에서만 삭제 (Save 시 DB 반영)
   574→    Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDelete.Click
   575→        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
   576→            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
   577→            Return
   578→        End If
   579→
   580→        If DgvSeq.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
   581→            MsgBox("삭제할 행을 선택하세요.")
   582→            Return
   583→        End If
   584→
   585→        Dim selectedRow As DataGridViewRow = DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0)
   586→        Dim seqID As String = selectedRow.Cells("SeqID").Value.ToString()
   587→
   588→        ' NEW가 아닌 경우 삭제 대기 목록에 추가
   589→        If seqID <> "NEW" Then
   590→            If Not DeletedSeqIDs.Contains(seqID) Then
   591→                DeletedSeqIDs.Add(seqID)
   592→            End If
   593→        End If
   594→
   595→        ' 그리드에서 행 제거
   596→        DgvSeq.Rows.Remove(selectedRow)

   599→    ' 시퀀스 삭제
   600→    Private Sub DeleteSeq(workID As String, seqID As String)
   601→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   602→        Try
   603→            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   604→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   605→            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   606→            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   607→
   608→            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID, MdbConnect)
   609→            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
   610→                Rs.Delete()
   611→                Rs.Update()
   612→            End If
   613→            Rs.Close()
   614→        Catch ex As Exception
   615→            MsgBox("삭제 오류: " & ex.Message)
   616→        Finally
   617→            ConnectionCloseMDB()
   618→        End Try
   619→    End Sub

   623→        If DgvSeq.SelectedRows.Count = 0 OrElse DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index <= 0 Then Return
   624→        SwapRows(DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index, DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index - 1)

   630→        SwapRows(DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index, DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index + 1)

   633→    ' 두 행 교환 (저장 없이 그리드 내에서만 교환)
   634→    Private Sub SwapRows(index1 As Integer, index2 As Integer)
   635→        For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In DgvSeq.Columns
   636→            If col.Name = "WorkID" OrElse col.Name = "SeqID" Then Continue For
   637→            Dim temp As Object = DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value
   638→            DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value = DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value
   639→            DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value = temp
   640→        Next
   641→        ' 선택 유지
   642→        DgvSeq.ClearSelection()
   643→        DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Selected = True
   644→    End Sub

   656→    ' 새 WorkID 생성

   659→        Dim newID As String = "1"
   660→        Try

   662→            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

   682→    ' Copy 버튼 - 첫 클릭: To/CboCopyTo 활성화, 두번째 클릭: 복사 실행
   683→    Private Sub BtnCopy_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnCopy.Click
   684→        If Not CopyMode Then
   685→            ' Copy 모드 활성화
   686→            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse Not FlagLoad Then
   687→                MsgBox("먼저 WorkID를 선택하고 Load 하세요.")
   688→                Return
   689→            End If
   690→            CopyMode = True
   691→            LblCopyTo.Visible = True
   692→            CboCopyTo.Visible = True
   693→            CboCopyTo.Text = ""
   694→            CboCopyTo.Focus()
   695→            BtnCopy.Text = "Execute"
   696→        Else
   697→            ' 복사 실행
   698→            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse CboCopyTo.Text = "" Then
   699→                MsgBox("원본 WorkID와 대상 ID를 지정하세요.")
   700→                Return
   701→            End If
   702→
   703→            Dim fromID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()
   704→            Dim toID As String = CboCopyTo.Text
   705→
   706→            If fromID = toID Then
   707→                MsgBox("같은 ID 입니다.")
   708→                Return
   709→            End If
   710→
   711→            ' 대상 ID 삭제 후 복사
   712→            DeleteWorkID(toID)
   713→            CopyWorkID(fromID, toID)
   714→            LoadWorkIDComboBox()
   715→            MsgBox("복사 완료: " & fromID & " -> " & toID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)
   716→
   717→            ' Copy 모드 해제
   718→            CopyMode = False
   719→            LblCopyTo.Visible = False
   720→            CboCopyTo.Visible = False
   721→            BtnCopy.Text = "Copy"
   722→        End If
   723→    End Sub

   725→    ' WorkID 삭제
   726→    Private Sub DeleteWorkID(workID As String)

   730→        Catch ex As Exception
   731→        Finally
   732→            ConnectionCloseMDB()
   733→        End Try

   736→    ' WorkID 복사
   737→    Private Sub CopyWorkID(fromID As String, toID As String)
   738→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   739→        Try
   740→            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
   741→                Dim strSQL As String = "INSERT INTO TABLE_SEQ (WorkId,SeqID,WorkInfo,FontSize,ImagePath,Type,Target,MainImagePath,NgImagePath," &
   742→                    "IN1,IN1_STATE,IN2,IN2_STATE,IN3,IN3_STATE,IN4,IN4_STATE," &
   743→                    "OUT1,OUT1_ONOFF,OUT2,OUT2_ONOFF,OUT3,OUT3_ONOFF,OUT4,OUT4_ONOFF," &
   744→                    "IncludeBarcode,DuplicateCheck,DataSave,ColumnName) VALUES (" &
   745→                    "'" & toID & "'," &
   746→                    (i + 1).ToString() & "," &
   747→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
   748→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value) & "'," &
   749→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
   750→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value) & "'," &
   751→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
   752→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
   753→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
   754→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value) & "'," &
   755→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value) & "'," &
   756→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value) & "'," &
   757→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value) & "'," &
   758→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value) & "'," &
   759→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value) & "'," &
   760→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value) & "'," &
   761→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value) & "'," &
   762→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value) & "'," &
   763→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
   764→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value) & "'," &
   765→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
   766→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value) & "'," &
   767→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
   768→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value) & "'," &
   769→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
   770→                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value).ToString() & "," &
   771→                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value).ToString() & "," &
   772→                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value).ToString() & "," &
   773→                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value) & "')"
   774→                MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
   775→            Next
   776→        Catch ex As Exception
   777→            MsgBox("복사 오류: " & ex.Message)
   778→        Finally
   779→            ConnectionCloseMDB()
   780→        End Try
   781→    End Sub

   783→    ' Column Check 버튼 - DataSave 컬럼 자동 생성
   784→    Private Sub BtnColumnCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnColumnCheck.Click

   788→
   789→    ' 자동 컬럼 체크 - 에러 무시하고 컬럼 추가
   790→    Private Sub AutoColumnCheck()
   791→        For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
   792→            If CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value) = True Then
   793→                Dim colName As String = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
   794→                If colName <> "" Then
   795→                    Try
   796→                        ExecuteQurrySQL("ALTER TABLE " & ServerTableName & " ADD " & colName & " NVARCHAR(200) NULL")
   797→                    Catch ex As Exception
   798→                        ' 이미 존재하는 컬럼이면 무시
   799→                    End Try
   800→                End If
   801→            End If
   802→        Next
   803→    End Sub

   805→    ' 셀 클릭 - 이미지 경로 선택
   806→    Private Sub DgvSeq_CellClick(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.CellClick
   807→        If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return
   808→
   809→        Dim colName As String = DgvSeq.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
   810→        If colName = "ImagePath" OrElse colName = "MainImagePath" OrElse colName = "NgImagePath" Then
   811→            Dim openDlg As New OpenFileDialog()
   812→            openDlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.bmp;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
   813→            If openDlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
   814→                DgvSeq.Rows(e.RowIndex).Cells(colName).Value = openDlg.FileName
   815→            End If
   816→        End If

Public Class FrmSeq2

    Private FlagLoad As Boolean = False
    Private SelectedRowIndex As Integer = -1
    Private CopyMode As Boolean = False
    Private DeletedSeqIDs As New List(Of String)  ' 삭제 대기 SeqID 목록

    Private Sub FrmSeq2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        InitGrid()
        ' Copy 모드 초기화 - To/CboCopyTo 비활성화
        LblCopyTo.Visible = False
        CboCopyTo.Visible = False
    End Sub

    ' DataError 이벤트 - 콤보박스 값 오류 처리
    Private Sub DgvSeq_DataError(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewDataErrorEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.DataError
        ' 콤보박스에 없는 값이 DB에 있을 경우 에러 무시
        e.ThrowException = False
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 콤보박스 로드
    Private Sub LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

            CboWorkID.Items.Clear()
            CboCopyTo.Items.Clear()

            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID), WORKID", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    CboWorkID.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    CboCopyTo.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()

            If CboWorkID.Items.Count > 0 Then
                CboWorkID.SelectedIndex = 0
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("WorkID 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DataGridView 초기화
    Private Sub InitGrid()
        With DgvSeq
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect
            .MultiSelect = False
            .RowHeadersWidth = 40
            .DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("맑은 고딕", 10)
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("맑은 고딕", 10, FontStyle.Bold)
            .RowTemplate.Height = 36

            ' 일반 텍스트 컬럼
            .Columns.Add("WorkID", "WorkID")
            .Columns.Add("SeqID", "SeqID")
            .Columns.Add("WorkInfo", "MESSAGE")

            ' FontSize 콤보박스
            Dim cboFontSize As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            cboFontSize.Name = "FontSize"
            cboFontSize.HeaderText = "FontSize"
            cboFontSize.Items.AddRange("", "20", "25", "30", "35", "40", "45", "50", "60", "70", "80")
            cboFontSize.Width = 60
            .Columns.Add(cboFontSize)

            .Columns.Add("ImagePath", "SubImage")

            ' Type 콤보박스
            Dim cboType As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            cboType.Name = "Type"
            cboType.HeaderText = "Type"
            cboType.Items.AddRange("", "QUERY", "SCAN", "SCAN_VER", "SCAN-PRINT", "MESSAGE", "CHECK",
                "TQ TOOL1", "TQ TOOL2", "TQ TOOL3", "TQ TOOL4", "LASER", "LASER_END", "AIR TOOL",
                "BARCODE", "RS232", "PALLET INIT", "PALLET SAVE", "DELAY", "RESIST", "IOCHECK",
                "SAVECHECK", "LENGTH", "TEST", "TEST1", "TEST2", "TEST3", "STAGECHECK",
                "CAN-FD", "CAN-FD-FC", "PARTCHECK")
            cboType.Width = 110
            .Columns.Add(cboType)

            .Columns.Add("Target", "Target")
            .Columns.Add("MainImagePath", "MainImage")
            .Columns.Add("NgImagePath", "NgImage")

            ' IN 주소 목록 생성 (PlcInSignalStartAddress 기준)
            Dim inItems As New List(Of String)
            inItems.Add("")
            inItems.Add("NoUse")
            For i As Integer = PlcInSignalStartAddress + 1 To PlcInSignalStartAddress + 2
                For j As Integer = 0 To 15
                    inItems.Add($"{i}.{j}")
                Next
            Next

            ' OUT 주소 목록 생성 (PlcOutSignalStartAddress 기준)
            Dim outItems As New List(Of String)
            outItems.Add("")
            outItems.Add("NoUse")
            For i As Integer = PlcOutSignalStartAddress To PlcOutSignalStartAddress + 1
                For j As Integer = 0 To 15
                    outItems.Add($"{i}.{j}")
                Next
            Next
            outItems.Add("ALL OFF")

            ' IN1 콤보박스
            Dim cboIN1 As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            cboIN1.Name = "IN1"
            cboIN1.HeaderText = "IN1"
            cboIN1.Items.AddRange(inItems.ToArray())
            cboIN1.Width = 84
            .Columns.Add(cboIN1)

            ' State1 콤보박스

            ' IN2 콤보박스

            Dim cboState3 As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            cboState3.Name = "IN3_STATE"
            cboState3.HeaderText = "State3"
            cboState3.Items.AddRange("", "-", "ON", "OFF")
            cboState3.Width = 55
            .Columns.Add(cboState3)

            ' IN4 콤보박스
            Dim cboIN4 As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()

            cboIN4.Items.AddRange(inItems.ToArray())

            ' OUT1 콤보박스

            ' OUT2 콤보박스
            Dim cboOUT2 As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()

            ' OUT3 콤보박스
            Dim cboOUT3 As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()

            ' 컬럼 너비 설정

            .Columns("WorkInfo").Width = 200

    ' 데이터 로드
    Private Sub LoadGrid(workID As String)
        DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()  ' 삭제 대기 목록 초기화
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            InitGrid()
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Dim rowIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Add()
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Type").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Target").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Target").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DataSave").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
            FlagLoad = True
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("데이터 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' NULL 체크
    Private Function NullCheck(value As Object) As String
        If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then
            Return ""
        Else
            Return value.ToString()
        End If
    End Function

    ' 저장 - 삭제/신규/수정 모두 처리
    Private Sub SaveGrid(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            ' 1. 삭제 대기 항목 DB에서 삭제
            For Each seqID As String In DeletedSeqIDs
                MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID)
            Next
            DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()

            ' 2. 기존 데이터 모두 삭제 후 그리드 내용으로 다시 INSERT (순서 보장)
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "'")

            ' 3. 그리드 내용 순서대로 INSERT
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
                Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = i + 1  ' 순번 재할당
                Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value)
                Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Type").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Target").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value)
                Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.Close()
            Next

            MsgBox("저장되었습니다.", MsgBoxStyle.Information, "Save")
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("저장 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        ' 저장 후 다시 로드하여 SeqID 갱신
        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    ' Load 버튼
    Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnLoad.Click
        If CboWorkID.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            LoadGrid(CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString())
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Save 버튼
    Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnSave.Click
        If FlagLoad AndAlso CboWorkID.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            ' 저장 전 ColumnCheck 자동 실행 (에러 무시)
            AutoColumnCheck()
            SaveGrid(CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString())
        Else
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Close 버튼
    Private Sub BtnClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnClose.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    ' Insert 버튼 - 선택 행 다음에 그리드에만 삽입 (Save 시 DB 반영)
    Private Sub BtnInsert_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnInsert.Click
        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        Dim workID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()

        ' 삽입 위치 결정
        Dim insertIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Count
        If DgvSeq.SelectedRows.Count > 0 Then
            insertIndex = DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index + 1
        End If

        ' 그리드에 새 행 삽입
        DgvSeq.Rows.Insert(insertIndex, 1)
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = workID
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = "NEW"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("FontSize").Value = "30"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("ImagePath").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("Target").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value = False
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value = False
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("DataSave").Value = False
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("ColumnName").Value = ""

        ' 새로 추가된 행 선택
        DgvSeq.ClearSelection()
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Selected = True
    End Sub

    ' 새 시퀀스 삽입
    Private Sub InsertNewSeq(workID As String, seqID As Double)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
            Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = seqID
            Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = "30"
            Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
            Rs.Fields("Target").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = False
            Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = False
            Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = False
            Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = ""
            Rs.Update()
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("삽입 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Reload 후 SeqID 재정렬
    Private Sub ReloadAndReorder(workID As String)
        SaveGrid(workID)
        LoadGrid(workID)

        ' SeqID 재정렬
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Dim num As Integer = 1
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = num
                    Rs.Update()
                    num += 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("재정렬 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    ' Delete 버튼 - 그리드에서만 삭제 (Save 시 DB 반영)
    Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDelete.Click
        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        If DgvSeq.SelectedRows.Count = 0 Then
            MsgBox("삭제할 행을 선택하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        Dim selectedRow As DataGridViewRow = DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0)
        Dim seqID As String = selectedRow.Cells("SeqID").Value.ToString()

        ' NEW가 아닌 경우 삭제 대기 목록에 추가
        If seqID <> "NEW" Then
            If Not DeletedSeqIDs.Contains(seqID) Then
                DeletedSeqIDs.Add(seqID)
            End If
        End If

        ' 그리드에서 행 제거
        DgvSeq.Rows.Remove(selectedRow)
    End Sub

    ' 시퀀스 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteSeq(workID As String, seqID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID, MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("삭제 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Up 버튼 - 순서 위로
    Private Sub BtnUp_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnUp.Click
        If DgvSeq.SelectedRows.Count = 0 OrElse DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index <= 0 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index, DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index - 1)
    End Sub

    ' Down 버튼 - 순서 아래로
    Private Sub BtnDown_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDown.Click
        If DgvSeq.SelectedRows.Count = 0 OrElse DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index >= DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index, DgvSeq.SelectedRows(0).Index + 1)
    End Sub

    ' 두 행 교환 (저장 없이 그리드 내에서만 교환)
    Private Sub SwapRows(index1 As Integer, index2 As Integer)
        For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In DgvSeq.Columns
            If col.Name = "WorkID" OrElse col.Name = "SeqID" Then Continue For
            Dim temp As Object = DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value = DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value = temp
        Next
        ' 선택 유지
        DgvSeq.ClearSelection()
        DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Selected = True
    End Sub

    ' New ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnNewID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnNewID.Click
        Dim newID As String = GetNewWorkID()
        InsertNewSeq(newID, 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = newID
        LoadGrid(newID)
        MsgBox("새 Work ID: " & newID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 새 WorkID 생성
    Private Function GetNewWorkID() As String
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim newID As String = "1"
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
            newID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
        Return newID
    End Function

    ' Reset ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnResetID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnResetID.Click
        InsertNewSeq("RESET", 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = "RESET"
        LoadGrid("RESET")
        MsgBox("RESET ID 생성됨", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' Copy 버튼 - 첫 클릭: To/CboCopyTo 활성화, 두번째 클릭: 복사 실행
    Private Sub BtnCopy_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnCopy.Click
        If Not CopyMode Then
            ' Copy 모드 활성화
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse Not FlagLoad Then
                MsgBox("먼저 WorkID를 선택하고 Load 하세요.")
                Return
            End If
            CopyMode = True
            LblCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Text = ""
            CboCopyTo.Focus()
            BtnCopy.Text = "Execute"
        Else
            ' 복사 실행
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse CboCopyTo.Text = "" Then
                MsgBox("원본 WorkID와 대상 ID를 지정하세요.")
                Return
            End If

            Dim fromID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()
            Dim toID As String = CboCopyTo.Text

            If fromID = toID Then
                MsgBox("같은 ID 입니다.")
                Return
            End If

            ' 대상 ID 삭제 후 복사
            DeleteWorkID(toID)
            CopyWorkID(fromID, toID)
            LoadWorkIDComboBox()
            MsgBox("복사 완료: " & fromID & " -> " & toID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)

            ' Copy 모드 해제
            CopyMode = False
            LblCopyTo.Visible = False
            CboCopyTo.Visible = False
            BtnCopy.Text = "Copy"
        End If
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteWorkID(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM TABLE_SEQ WHERE WORKID = '" & workID & "'")
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 복사
    Private Sub CopyWorkID(fromID As String, toID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Dim strSQL As String = "INSERT INTO TABLE_SEQ (WorkId,SeqID,WorkInfo,FontSize,ImagePath,Type,Target,MainImagePath,NgImagePath," &
                    "IN1,IN1_STATE,IN2,IN2_STATE,IN3,IN3_STATE,IN4,IN4_STATE," &
                    "OUT1,OUT1_ONOFF,OUT2,OUT2_ONOFF,OUT3,OUT3_ONOFF,OUT4,OUT4_ONOFF," &
                    "IncludeBarcode,DuplicateCheck,DataSave,ColumnName) VALUES (" &
                    "'" & toID & "'," &
                    (i + 1).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value) & "')"
                MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
            Next
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("복사 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Column Check 버튼 - DataSave 컬럼 자동 생성
    Private Sub BtnColumnCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnColumnCheck.Click
        AutoColumnCheck()
        MsgBox("컬럼 체크 완료", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 자동 컬럼 체크 - 에러 무시하고 컬럼 추가
    Private Sub AutoColumnCheck()
        For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
            If CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value) = True Then
                Dim colName As String = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                If colName <> "" Then
                    Try
                        ExecuteQurrySQL("ALTER TABLE " & ServerTableName & " ADD " & colName & " NVARCHAR(200) NULL")
                    Catch ex As Exception
                        ' 이미 존재하는 컬럼이면 무시
                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    ' 셀 클릭 - 이미지 경로 선택
    Private Sub DgvSeq_CellClick(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.CellClick
        If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return

        Dim colName As String = DgvSeq.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
        If colName = "ImagePath" OrElse colName = "MainImagePath" OrElse colName = "NgImagePath" Then
            Dim openDlg As New OpenFileDialog()
            openDlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.bmp;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
            If openDlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
                DgvSeq.Rows(e.RowIndex).Cells(colName).Value = openDlg.FileName
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

Public Class FrmSeq2

    Private Sub FrmSeq2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        ' 콤보박스에 없는 값이 DB에 있을 경우 에러 무시
        e.ThrowException = False
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 콤보박스 로드
    Private Sub LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

            CboWorkID.Items.Clear()
            CboCopyTo.Items.Clear()

            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID), WORKID", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    CboWorkID.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    CboCopyTo.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()

            If CboWorkID.Items.Count > 0 Then
                CboWorkID.SelectedIndex = 0
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("WorkID 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DataGridView 초기화

        With DgvSeq

            cboFontSize.Width = 60
            .Columns.Add(cboFontSize)

            .Columns.Add("ImagePath", "SubImage")

            ' Type 콤보박스

            cboType.Items.AddRange("", "QUERY", "SCAN", "SCAN_VER", "SCAN-PRINT", "MESSAGE", "CHECK",
                "TQ TOOL1", "TQ TOOL2", "TQ TOOL3", "TQ TOOL4", "LASER", "LASER_END", "AIR TOOL",
                "BARCODE", "RS232", "PALLET INIT", "PALLET SAVE", "DELAY", "RESIST", "IOCHECK",

                "CAN-FD", "CAN-FD-FC", "PARTCHECK")

            ' IN 주소 목록 생성 (PlcInSignalStartAddress 기준)

            chkIncludeBarcode.Name = "IncludeBarcode"
            chkIncludeBarcode.HeaderText = "IncludeBarcode"
            chkIncludeBarcode.Width = 100
            .Columns.Add(chkIncludeBarcode)

            Dim chkDuplicateCheck As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
            chkDuplicateCheck.Name = "DuplicateCheck"
            chkDuplicateCheck.HeaderText = "DuplicateCheck"
            chkDuplicateCheck.Width = 100
            .Columns.Add(chkDuplicateCheck)

            Dim chkDataSave As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
            chkDataSave.Name = "DataSave"
            chkDataSave.HeaderText = "DataSave"
            chkDataSave.Width = 80
            .Columns.Add(chkDataSave)

            .Columns.Add("ColumnName", "ColumnName")

            ' 컬럼 너비 설정
            .Columns("WorkID").Width = 60
            .Columns("WorkID").ReadOnly = True
            .Columns("SeqID").Width = 50
            .Columns("SeqID").ReadOnly = True
            .Columns("WorkInfo").Width = 200
            .Columns("ImagePath").Width = 100
            .Columns("Target").Width = 200
            .Columns("MainImagePath").Width = 100
            .Columns("NgImagePath").Width = 100
            .Columns("ColumnName").Width = 150
        End With

    ' 데이터 로드
    Private Sub LoadGrid(workID As String)
        DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()  ' 삭제 대기 목록 초기화
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            InitGrid()
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Dim rowIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Add()
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Type").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Target").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Target").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DataSave").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
            FlagLoad = True
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("데이터 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' NULL 체크
    Private Function NullCheck(value As Object) As String
        If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then
            Return ""
        Else
            Return value.ToString()
        End If
    End Function

    ' 저장 - 삭제/신규/수정 모두 처리
    Private Sub SaveGrid(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            ' 1. 삭제 대기 항목 DB에서 삭제
            For Each seqID As String In DeletedSeqIDs
                MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID)
            Next
            DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()

            ' 2. 기존 데이터 모두 삭제 후 그리드 내용으로 다시 INSERT (순서 보장)
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "'")

            ' 3. 그리드 내용 순서대로 INSERT
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
                Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = i + 1  ' 순번 재할당
                Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value)
                Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Type").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Target").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value)
                Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.Close()
            Next

            MsgBox("저장되었습니다.", MsgBoxStyle.Information, "Save")
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("저장 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        ' 저장 후 다시 로드하여 SeqID 갱신
        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnLoad.Click

            LoadGrid(CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString())

    ' Save 버튼
    Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnSave.Click

        End If
    End Sub

    ' Close 버튼
    Private Sub BtnClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnClose.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"

            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
            Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = seqID
            Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = "30"
            Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
            Rs.Fields("Target").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"

        End Try
