    ' Reload 후 SeqID 재정렬
    Private Sub ReloadAndReorder(workID As String)
        SaveGrid(workID)
        LoadGrid(workID)

        ' SeqID 재정렬
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Dim num As Integer = 1
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = num
                    Rs.Update()
                    num += 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("재정렬 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    ' Delete 버튼 - 그리드에서만 삭제 (Save 시 DB 반영)
    Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDelete.Click
        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("삭제할 행을 선택하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        Dim selectedRow As DataGridViewRow = DgvSeq.CurrentRow
        Dim seqID As String = selectedRow.Cells("SeqID").Value.ToString()

        ' NEW가 아닌 경우 삭제 대기 목록에 추가
        If seqID <> "NEW" Then
            If Not DeletedSeqIDs.Contains(seqID) Then
                DeletedSeqIDs.Add(seqID)
            End If
        End If

        ' 그리드에서 행 제거
        DgvSeq.Rows.Remove(selectedRow)
    End Sub

    ' 시퀀스 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteSeq(workID As String, seqID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID, MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("삭제 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Up 버튼 - 순서 위로
    Private Sub BtnUp_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnUp.Click
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing OrElse DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index <= 0 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index, DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index - 1)
    End Sub

    ' Down 버튼 - 순서 아래로
    Private Sub BtnDown_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDown.Click
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing OrElse DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index >= DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index, DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index + 1)
    End Sub

    ' 두 행 교환 (저장 없이 그리드 내에서만 교환)
    Private Sub SwapRows(index1 As Integer, index2 As Integer)
        For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In DgvSeq.Columns
            If col.Name = "WorkID" OrElse col.Name = "SeqID" Then Continue For
            Dim temp As Object = DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value = DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value = temp
        Next
        ' 선택 유지
        DgvSeq.ClearSelection()
        DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Selected = True
    End Sub

    ' New ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnNewID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnNewID.Click
        Dim newID As String = GetNewWorkID()
        InsertNewSeq(newID, 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = newID
        LoadGrid(newID)
        MsgBox("새 Work ID: " & newID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 새 WorkID 생성
    Private Function GetNewWorkID() As String
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim newID As String = "1"
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
            newID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
        Return newID
    End Function

    ' Reset ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnResetID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnResetID.Click
        InsertNewSeq("RESET", 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = "RESET"
        LoadGrid("RESET")
        MsgBox("RESET ID 생성됨", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' Copy 버튼 - 첫 클릭: To/CboCopyTo 활성화, 두번째 클릭: 복사 실행
    Private Sub BtnCopy_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnCopy.Click
        If Not CopyMode Then
            ' Copy 모드 활성화
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse Not FlagLoad Then
                MsgBox("먼저 WorkID를 선택하고 Load 하세요.")
                Return
            End If
            CopyMode = True
            LblCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Text = ""
            CboCopyTo.Focus()
            BtnCopy.Text = "Execute"
        Else
            ' 복사 실행
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse CboCopyTo.Text = "" Then
                MsgBox("원본 WorkID와 대상 ID를 지정하세요.")
                Return
            End If

            Dim fromID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()
            Dim toID As String = CboCopyTo.Text

            If fromID = toID Then
                MsgBox("같은 ID 입니다.")
                Return
            End If

            ' 대상 ID 삭제 후 복사
            DeleteWorkID(toID)
            CopyWorkID(fromID, toID)
            LoadWorkIDComboBox()
            MsgBox("복사 완료: " & fromID & " -> " & toID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)

            ' Copy 모드 해제
            CopyMode = False
            LblCopyTo.Visible = False
            CboCopyTo.Visible = False
            BtnCopy.Text = "Copy"
        End If
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteWorkID(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM TABLE_SEQ WHERE WORKID = '" & workID & "'")
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 복사
    Private Sub CopyWorkID(fromID As String, toID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Dim strSQL As String = "INSERT INTO TABLE_SEQ (WorkId,SeqID,WorkInfo,FontSize,ImagePath,Type,Target,MainImagePath,NgImagePath," &
                    "IN1,IN1_STATE,IN2,IN2_STATE,IN3,IN3_STATE,IN4,IN4_STATE," &
                    "OUT1,OUT1_ONOFF,OUT2,OUT2_ONOFF,OUT3,OUT3_ONOFF,OUT4,OUT4_ONOFF," &
                    "IncludeBarcode,DuplicateCheck,DataSave,ColumnName) VALUES (" &
                    "'" & toID & "'," &
                    (i + 1).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value) & "')"
                MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
            Next
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("복사 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Column Check 버튼 - DataSave 컬럼 자동 생성
    Private Sub BtnColumnCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnColumnCheck.Click
        AutoColumnCheck()
        MsgBox("컬럼 체크 완료", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 자동 컬럼 체크 - 에러 무시하고 컬럼 추가
    Private Sub AutoColumnCheck()
        For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
            If CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value) = True Then
                Dim colName As String = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                If colName <> "" Then
                    Try
                        ExecuteQurrySQL("ALTER TABLE " & ServerTableName & " ADD " & colName & " NVARCHAR(200) NULL")
                    Catch ex As Exception
                        ' 이미 존재하는 컬럼이면 무시
                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    ' 셀 클릭 - 이미지 경로 선택
    Private Sub DgvSeq_CellClick(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.CellClick
        If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return

        Dim colName As String = DgvSeq.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
        If colName = "ImagePath" OrElse colName = "MainImagePath" OrElse colName = "NgImagePath" Then
            Dim openDlg As New OpenFileDialog()
            openDlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.bmp;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
            If openDlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
                DgvSeq.Rows(e.RowIndex).Cells(colName).Value = openDlg.FileName
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

    ' WorkID 콤보박스 로드
    Private Sub LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

            CboWorkID.Items.Clear()
            CboCopyTo.Items.Clear()

            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID), WORKID", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    CboWorkID.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    CboCopyTo.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()

            If CboWorkID.Items.Count > 0 Then
                CboWorkID.SelectedIndex = 0
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("WorkID 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' 데이터 로드
    Private Sub LoadGrid(workID As String)
        DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()  ' 삭제 대기 목록 초기화
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            InitGrid()
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Dim rowIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Add()
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Type").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Target").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Target").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DataSave").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
            FlagLoad = True
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("데이터 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' NULL 체크
    Private Function NullCheck(value As Object) As String
        If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then
            Return ""
        Else
            Return value.ToString()
        End If
    End Function

    ' 저장 - 삭제/신규/수정 모두 처리
    Private Sub SaveGrid(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            ' 1. 삭제 대기 항목 DB에서 삭제
            For Each seqID As String In DeletedSeqIDs
                MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID)
            Next
            DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()

            ' 2. 기존 데이터 모두 삭제 후 그리드 내용으로 다시 INSERT (순서 보장)
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "'")

            ' 3. 그리드 내용 순서대로 INSERT
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
                Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = i + 1  ' 순번 재할당
                Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value)
                Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Type").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Target").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value)
                Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.Close()
            Next

            MsgBox("저장되었습니다.", MsgBoxStyle.Information, "Save")
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("저장 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        ' 저장 후 다시 로드하여 SeqID 갱신
        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    ' Load 버튼
    Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnLoad.Click
        If CboWorkID.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            LoadGrid(CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString())
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Save 버튼
    Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnSave.Click
        If FlagLoad AndAlso CboWorkID.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            ' 저장 전 ColumnCheck 자동 실행 (에러 무시)
            AutoColumnCheck()
            SaveGrid(CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString())
        Else
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Close 버튼
    Private Sub BtnClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnClose.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    ' Insert 버튼 - 선택 행 다음에 그리드에만 삽입 (Save 시 DB 반영)
    Private Sub BtnInsert_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnInsert.Click
        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        Dim workID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()

        ' 삽입 위치 결정
        Dim insertIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Count
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow IsNot Nothing Then
            insertIndex = DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index + 1
        End If

        ' 그리드에 새 행 삽입
        DgvSeq.Rows.Insert(insertIndex, 1)
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = workID
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = "NEW"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("FontSize").Value = "30"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("ImagePath").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("Target").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value = False
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value = False
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("DataSave").Value = False
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("ColumnName").Value = ""

        ' 새로 추가된 행 선택
        DgvSeq.ClearSelection()
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Selected = True
    End Sub

    ' 새 시퀀스 삽입
    Private Sub InsertNewSeq(workID As String, seqID As Double)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
            Rs.AddNew()
            Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
            Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = seqID
            Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = "30"
            Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("Type").Value = "MESSAGE"
            Rs.Fields("Target").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = "0"
            Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = "NoUse"
            Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = "-"
            Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = False
            Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = False
            Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = False
            Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = ""
            Rs.Update()
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("삽입 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Reload 후 SeqID 재정렬
    Private Sub ReloadAndReorder(workID As String)
        SaveGrid(workID)
        LoadGrid(workID)

        ' SeqID 재정렬
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Dim num As Integer = 1
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = num
                    Rs.Update()
                    num += 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("재정렬 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    ' Delete 버튼 - 그리드에서만 삭제 (Save 시 DB 반영)
    Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDelete.Click
        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("삭제할 행을 선택하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        Dim selectedRow As DataGridViewRow = DgvSeq.CurrentRow
        Dim seqID As String = selectedRow.Cells("SeqID").Value.ToString()

        ' NEW가 아닌 경우 삭제 대기 목록에 추가
        If seqID <> "NEW" Then
            If Not DeletedSeqIDs.Contains(seqID) Then
                DeletedSeqIDs.Add(seqID)
            End If
        End If

        ' 그리드에서 행 제거
        DgvSeq.Rows.Remove(selectedRow)
    End Sub

    ' 시퀀스 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteSeq(workID As String, seqID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID, MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("삭제 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Up 버튼 - 순서 위로
    Private Sub BtnUp_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnUp.Click
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing OrElse DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index <= 0 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index, DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index - 1)
    End Sub

    ' Down 버튼 - 순서 아래로
    Private Sub BtnDown_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDown.Click
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing OrElse DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index >= DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index, DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index + 1)
    End Sub

    ' 두 행 교환 (저장 없이 그리드 내에서만 교환)
    Private Sub SwapRows(index1 As Integer, index2 As Integer)
        For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In DgvSeq.Columns
            If col.Name = "WorkID" OrElse col.Name = "SeqID" Then Continue For
            Dim temp As Object = DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value = DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value = temp
        Next
        ' 선택 유지
        DgvSeq.ClearSelection()
        DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Selected = True
    End Sub

    ' New ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnNewID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnNewID.Click
        Dim newID As String = GetNewWorkID()
        InsertNewSeq(newID, 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = newID
        LoadGrid(newID)
        MsgBox("새 Work ID: " & newID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 새 WorkID 생성
    Private Function GetNewWorkID() As String
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim newID As String = "1"
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
            newID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
        Return newID
    End Function

    ' Reset ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnResetID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnResetID.Click
        InsertNewSeq("RESET", 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = "RESET"
        LoadGrid("RESET")
        MsgBox("RESET ID 생성됨", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' Copy 버튼 - 첫 클릭: To/CboCopyTo 활성화, 두번째 클릭: 복사 실행
    Private Sub BtnCopy_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnCopy.Click
        If Not CopyMode Then
            ' Copy 모드 활성화
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse Not FlagLoad Then
                MsgBox("먼저 WorkID를 선택하고 Load 하세요.")
                Return
            End If
            CopyMode = True
            LblCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Text = ""
            CboCopyTo.Focus()
            BtnCopy.Text = "Execute"
        Else
            ' 복사 실행
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse CboCopyTo.Text = "" Then
                MsgBox("원본 WorkID와 대상 ID를 지정하세요.")
                Return
            End If

            Dim fromID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()
            Dim toID As String = CboCopyTo.Text

            If fromID = toID Then
                MsgBox("같은 ID 입니다.")
                Return
            End If

            ' 대상 ID 삭제 후 복사
            DeleteWorkID(toID)
            CopyWorkID(fromID, toID)
            LoadWorkIDComboBox()
            MsgBox("복사 완료: " & fromID & " -> " & toID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)

            ' Copy 모드 해제
            CopyMode = False
            LblCopyTo.Visible = False
            CboCopyTo.Visible = False
            BtnCopy.Text = "Copy"
        End If
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteWorkID(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM TABLE_SEQ WHERE WORKID = '" & workID & "'")
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 복사
    Private Sub CopyWorkID(fromID As String, toID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Dim strSQL As String = "INSERT INTO TABLE_SEQ (WorkId,SeqID,WorkInfo,FontSize,ImagePath,Type,Target,MainImagePath,NgImagePath," &
                    "IN1,IN1_STATE,IN2,IN2_STATE,IN3,IN3_STATE,IN4,IN4_STATE," &
                    "OUT1,OUT1_ONOFF,OUT2,OUT2_ONOFF,OUT3,OUT3_ONOFF,OUT4,OUT4_ONOFF," &
                    "IncludeBarcode,DuplicateCheck,DataSave,ColumnName) VALUES (" &
                    "'" & toID & "'," &
                    (i + 1).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value) & "')"
                MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
            Next
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("복사 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Column Check 버튼 - DataSave 컬럼 자동 생성
    Private Sub BtnColumnCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnColumnCheck.Click
        AutoColumnCheck()
        MsgBox("컬럼 체크 완료", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 자동 컬럼 체크 - 에러 무시하고 컬럼 추가
    Private Sub AutoColumnCheck()
        For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
            If CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value) = True Then
                Dim colName As String = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                If colName <> "" Then
                    Try
                        ExecuteQurrySQL("ALTER TABLE " & ServerTableName & " ADD " & colName & " NVARCHAR(200) NULL")
                    Catch ex As Exception
                        ' 이미 존재하는 컬럼이면 무시
                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    ' 셀 클릭 - 이미지 경로 선택
    Private Sub DgvSeq_CellClick(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.CellClick
        If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return

        Dim colName As String = DgvSeq.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
        If colName = "ImagePath" OrElse colName = "MainImagePath" OrElse colName = "NgImagePath" Then
            Dim openDlg As New OpenFileDialog()
            openDlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.bmp;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
            If openDlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
                DgvSeq.Rows(e.RowIndex).Cells(colName).Value = openDlg.FileName
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

End Class

Public Class FrmSeq2

    Private FlagLoad As Boolean = False
    Private SelectedRowIndex As Integer = -1
    Private CopyMode As Boolean = False
    Private DeletedSeqIDs As New List(Of String)  ' 삭제 대기 SeqID 목록

    Private Sub FrmSeq2_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        InitGrid()
        ' Copy 모드 초기화 - To/CboCopyTo 비활성화
        LblCopyTo.Visible = False
        CboCopyTo.Visible = False
    End Sub

    ' DataError 이벤트 - 콤보박스 값 오류 처리
    Private Sub DgvSeq_DataError(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewDataErrorEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.DataError
        ' 콤보박스에 없는 값이 DB에 있을 경우 에러 무시
        e.ThrowException = False
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 콤보박스 로드
    Private Sub LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient

            CboWorkID.Items.Clear()
            CboCopyTo.Items.Clear()

            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID, COUNT(*) as CNT FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID ORDER BY LEN(WORKID), WORKID", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    CboWorkID.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    CboCopyTo.Items.Add(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value.ToString())
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()

            If CboWorkID.Items.Count > 0 Then
                CboWorkID.SelectedIndex = 0
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("WorkID 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' DataGridView 초기화
    Private Sub InitGrid()
        With DgvSeq
            .Columns.Clear()
            .Rows.Clear()
            .AllowUserToAddRows = False
            .AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
            .SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect
            .MultiSelect = False
            .ClipboardCopyMode = DataGridViewClipboardCopyMode.Disable
            .RowHeadersWidth = 40
            .DefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("맑은 고딕", 10)
            .ColumnHeadersDefaultCellStyle.Font = New Font("맑은 고딕", 10, FontStyle.Bold)
            .RowTemplate.Height = 36

            ' 일반 텍스트 컬럼
            .Columns.Add("WorkID", "WorkID")
            .Columns.Add("SeqID", "SeqID")
            .Columns.Add("WorkInfo", "MESSAGE")

            ' FontSize 콤보박스
            Dim cboFontSize As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            cboFontSize.Name = "FontSize"
            cboFontSize.HeaderText = "FontSize"
            cboFontSize.Items.AddRange("", "20", "25", "30", "35", "40", "45", "50", "60", "70", "80")
            cboFontSize.Width = 60
            .Columns.Add(cboFontSize)

            .Columns.Add("ImagePath", "SubImage")

            ' Type 콤보박스
            Dim cboType As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
            cboType.Name = "Type"
            cboType.HeaderText = "Type"
            cboType.Items.AddRange("", "QUERY", "SCAN", "SCAN_VER", "SCAN-PRINT", "MESSAGE", "CHECK",
                "TQ TOOL1", "TQ TOOL2", "TQ TOOL3", "TQ TOOL4", "LASER", "LASER_END", "AIR TOOL",

    ' 데이터 로드
    Private Sub LoadGrid(workID As String)
        DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()  ' 삭제 대기 목록 초기화
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            InitGrid()
            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)

            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Dim rowIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Add()
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Type").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Type").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("Target").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("Target").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("DataSave").Value = CBool(Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value)
                    DgvSeq.Rows(rowIndex).Cells("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
            FlagLoad = True
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("데이터 로드 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' NULL 체크
    Private Function NullCheck(value As Object) As String
        If IsDBNull(value) OrElse value Is Nothing Then
            Return ""
        Else
            Return value.ToString()
        End If
    End Function

    ' 저장 - 삭제/신규/수정 모두 처리
    Private Sub SaveGrid(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            ' 1. 삭제 대기 항목 DB에서 삭제
            For Each seqID As String In DeletedSeqIDs
                MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID)
            Next
            DeletedSeqIDs.Clear()

            ' 2. 기존 데이터 모두 삭제 후 그리드 내용으로 다시 INSERT (순서 보장)
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "'")

            ' 3. 그리드 내용 순서대로 INSERT
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq", MdbConnect)
                Rs.AddNew()
                Rs.Fields("WorkID").Value = workID
                Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = i + 1  ' 순번 재할당
                Rs.Fields("WorkInfo").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value)
                Rs.Fields("FontSize").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Type").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value)
                Rs.Fields("Target").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value)
                Rs.Fields("MainImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("NgImagePath").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN1_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN2_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN3_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IN4_STATE").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT2_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT3_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value)
                Rs.Fields("OUT4_ONOFF").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value)
                Rs.Fields("IncludeBarcode").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DuplicateCheck").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value)
                Rs.Fields("DataSave").Value = CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value)
                Rs.Fields("ColumnName").Value = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                Rs.Update()
                Rs.Close()
            Next

            MsgBox("저장되었습니다.", MsgBoxStyle.Information, "Save")
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("저장 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        ' 저장 후 다시 로드하여 SeqID 갱신
        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    ' Load 버튼
    Private Sub BtnLoad_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnLoad.Click
        If CboWorkID.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            LoadGrid(CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString())
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Save 버튼
    Private Sub BtnSave_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnSave.Click
        If FlagLoad AndAlso CboWorkID.SelectedItem IsNot Nothing Then
            ' 저장 전 ColumnCheck 자동 실행 (에러 무시)
            AutoColumnCheck()
            SaveGrid(CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString())
        Else
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
        End If
    End Sub

    ' Close 버튼
    Private Sub BtnClose_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnClose.Click
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

    ' Insert 버튼 - 선택 행 다음에 그리드에만 삽입 (Save 시 DB 반영)
    Private Sub BtnInsert_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnInsert.Click
        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        Dim workID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()

        ' 삽입 위치 결정
        Dim insertIndex As Integer = DgvSeq.Rows.Count
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow IsNot Nothing Then
            insertIndex = DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index + 1
        End If

        ' 그리드에 새 행 삽입
        DgvSeq.Rows.Insert(insertIndex, 1)
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("WorkID").Value = workID
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("SeqID").Value = "NEW"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("WorkInfo").Value = "-"

        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("NgImagePath").Value = "0"

        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN2").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN3").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN4").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value = "-"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT1").Value = "NoUse"
        DgvSeq.Rows(insertIndex).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value = "-"

    ' Reload 후 SeqID 재정렬
    Private Sub ReloadAndReorder(workID As String)
        SaveGrid(workID)
        LoadGrid(workID)

        ' SeqID 재정렬
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' ORDER BY SeqID ASC", MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount > 0 Then
                Dim num As Integer = 1
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("SeqID").Value = num
                    Rs.Update()
                    num += 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("재정렬 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try

        LoadGrid(workID)
    End Sub

    ' Delete 버튼 - 그리드에서만 삭제 (Save 시 DB 반영)
    Private Sub BtnDelete_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDelete.Click
        If Not FlagLoad OrElse CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("먼저 Load 하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing Then
            MsgBox("삭제할 행을 선택하세요.")
            Return
        End If

        Dim selectedRow As DataGridViewRow = DgvSeq.CurrentRow
        Dim seqID As String = selectedRow.Cells("SeqID").Value.ToString()

        ' NEW가 아닌 경우 삭제 대기 목록에 추가
        If seqID <> "NEW" Then
            If Not DeletedSeqIDs.Contains(seqID) Then
                DeletedSeqIDs.Add(seqID)
            End If
        End If

        ' 그리드에서 행 제거
        DgvSeq.Rows.Remove(selectedRow)
    End Sub

    ' 시퀀스 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteSeq(workID As String, seqID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
            Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

            Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Seq WHERE WorkID = '" & workID & "' AND SeqID = " & seqID, MdbConnect)
            If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                Rs.Delete()
                Rs.Update()
            End If
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("삭제 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Up 버튼 - 순서 위로
    Private Sub BtnUp_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnUp.Click
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing OrElse DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index <= 0 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index, DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index - 1)
    End Sub

    ' Down 버튼 - 순서 아래로
    Private Sub BtnDown_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnDown.Click
        If DgvSeq.CurrentRow Is Nothing OrElse DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index >= DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1 Then Return
        SwapRows(DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index, DgvSeq.CurrentRow.Index + 1)
    End Sub

    ' 두 행 교환 (저장 없이 그리드 내에서만 교환)
    Private Sub SwapRows(index1 As Integer, index2 As Integer)
        For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In DgvSeq.Columns
            If col.Name = "WorkID" OrElse col.Name = "SeqID" Then Continue For
            Dim temp As Object = DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index1).Cells(col.Name).Value = DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value
            DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Cells(col.Name).Value = temp
        Next
        ' 선택 유지
        DgvSeq.ClearSelection()
        DgvSeq.Rows(index2).Selected = True
    End Sub

    ' New ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnNewID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnNewID.Click
        Dim newID As String = GetNewWorkID()
        InsertNewSeq(newID, 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = newID
        LoadGrid(newID)
        MsgBox("새 Work ID: " & newID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 새 WorkID 생성
    Private Function GetNewWorkID() As String
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim newID As String = "1"
        Try
            Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
            Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
            Rs.Open("SELECT WORKID FROM TABLE_SEQ GROUP BY WORKID", MdbConnect)
            newID = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
            Rs.Close()
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
        Return newID
    End Function

    ' Reset ID 버튼
    Private Sub BtnResetID_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnResetID.Click
        InsertNewSeq("RESET", 1)
        LoadWorkIDComboBox()
        CboWorkID.SelectedItem = "RESET"
        LoadGrid("RESET")
        MsgBox("RESET ID 생성됨", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' Copy 버튼 - 첫 클릭: To/CboCopyTo 활성화, 두번째 클릭: 복사 실행
    Private Sub BtnCopy_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnCopy.Click
        If Not CopyMode Then
            ' Copy 모드 활성화
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse Not FlagLoad Then
                MsgBox("먼저 WorkID를 선택하고 Load 하세요.")
                Return
            End If
            CopyMode = True
            LblCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Visible = True
            CboCopyTo.Text = ""
            CboCopyTo.Focus()
            BtnCopy.Text = "Execute"
        Else
            ' 복사 실행
            If CboWorkID.SelectedItem Is Nothing OrElse CboCopyTo.Text = "" Then
                MsgBox("원본 WorkID와 대상 ID를 지정하세요.")
                Return
            End If

            Dim fromID As String = CboWorkID.SelectedItem.ToString()
            Dim toID As String = CboCopyTo.Text

            If fromID = toID Then
                MsgBox("같은 ID 입니다.")
                Return
            End If

            ' 대상 ID 삭제 후 복사
            DeleteWorkID(toID)
            CopyWorkID(fromID, toID)
            LoadWorkIDComboBox()
            MsgBox("복사 완료: " & fromID & " -> " & toID, MsgBoxStyle.Information)

            ' Copy 모드 해제
            CopyMode = False
            LblCopyTo.Visible = False
            CboCopyTo.Visible = False
            BtnCopy.Text = "Copy"
        End If
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 삭제
    Private Sub DeleteWorkID(workID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute("DELETE FROM TABLE_SEQ WHERE WORKID = '" & workID & "'")
        Catch ex As Exception
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' WorkID 복사
    Private Sub CopyWorkID(fromID As String, toID As String)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
                Dim strSQL As String = "INSERT INTO TABLE_SEQ (WorkId,SeqID,WorkInfo,FontSize,ImagePath,Type,Target,MainImagePath,NgImagePath," &
                    "IN1,IN1_STATE,IN2,IN2_STATE,IN3,IN3_STATE,IN4,IN4_STATE," &
                    "OUT1,OUT1_ONOFF,OUT2,OUT2_ONOFF,OUT3,OUT3_ONOFF,OUT4,OUT4_ONOFF," &
                    "IncludeBarcode,DuplicateCheck,DataSave,ColumnName) VALUES (" &
                    "'" & toID & "'," &
                    (i + 1).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("WorkInfo").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("FontSize").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Type").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("Target").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("MainImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("NgImagePath").Value).Replace("'", "''") & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN1_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN2_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN3_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IN4_STATE").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT1_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT2_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT3_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4").Value) & "'," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("OUT4_ONOFF").Value) & "'," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("IncludeBarcode").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DuplicateCheck").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value).ToString() & "," &
                    "'" & NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value) & "')"
                MdbConnect.Execute(strSQL)
            Next
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("복사 오류: " & ex.Message)
        Finally
            ConnectionCloseMDB()
        End Try
    End Sub

    ' Column Check 버튼 - DataSave 컬럼 자동 생성
    Private Sub BtnColumnCheck_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles BtnColumnCheck.Click
        AutoColumnCheck()
        MsgBox("컬럼 체크 완료", MsgBoxStyle.Information)
    End Sub

    ' 자동 컬럼 체크 - 에러 무시하고 컬럼 추가
    Private Sub AutoColumnCheck()
        For i As Integer = 0 To DgvSeq.Rows.Count - 1
            If CBool(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("DataSave").Value) = True Then
                Dim colName As String = NullCheck(DgvSeq.Rows(i).Cells("ColumnName").Value)
                If colName <> "" Then
                    Try
                        ExecuteQurrySQL("ALTER TABLE " & ServerTableName & " ADD " & colName & " NVARCHAR(200) NULL")
                    Catch ex As Exception
                        ' 이미 존재하는 컬럼이면 무시
                    End Try
                End If
            End If
        Next
    End Sub

    ' 셀 클릭 - 이미지 경로 선택
    Private Sub DgvSeq_CellClick(sender As Object, e As DataGridViewCellEventArgs) Handles DgvSeq.CellClick
        If e.RowIndex < 0 OrElse e.ColumnIndex < 0 Then Return

        Dim colName As String = DgvSeq.Columns(e.ColumnIndex).Name
        If colName = "ImagePath" OrElse colName = "MainImagePath" OrElse colName = "NgImagePath" Then
            Dim openDlg As New OpenFileDialog()
            openDlg.Filter = "Image Files|*.jpg;*.jpeg;*.png;*.bmp;*.gif|All Files|*.*"
            If openDlg.ShowDialog() = DialogResult.OK Then
                DgvSeq.Rows(e.RowIndex).Cells(colName).Value = openDlg.FileName
            End If
        End If
    End Sub

End Class
